name: Coord agent detail / log (admin)
description: Admin per-agent live log view (/admin/coord/agents/[agent_id]). Like demo-detail this is a dynamic [id] route; the harness maps the `coord-agent-detail` spec id to /admin/coord/agents/<fixed sentinel id> via a routeForSpec override. ci-bot is a superuser so the page renders. The page fetches GET /operations/agent-logs/by-agent/<id> and was BROKEN before #272: a `new URL()` call threw, the catch set `error`, and the page fell to the `coord-agent-log-empty` placeholder. Post-#272 the fetch succeeds; for an unknown sentinel agent it returns zero rows. C2 ROUTE-STUB ADOPTION (ports admin.spec.ts:455 'per-agent page filters correctly'): metadata.routeStubs now fulfills GET /api/v1/operations/agent-logs/by-agent/spec-ci-sentinel-agent with three canned log rows (info/warn/info), so the page renders its POPULATED list state (coord-agent-log-list + agent-log-row), not just the empty-state chrome — deepening Spec CI coverage of the exact list/row rendering the e2e by-agent test exercised, with no live coord. We assert: (1) the agent-detail chrome that renders once the fetch resolves cleanly (page container, agent-id chip, filter/refresh controls), AND (2) the populated list + log rows that ONLY render when logs are present (the stub is load-bearing: remove it and the sentinel returns zero rows → coord-agent-log-list/agent-log-row disappear and that state reds). Distinguishable from the pre-#272 broken render which surfaced a 'Failed to load: …' paragraph and would red the same-origin HTTP-500 invariant. Read-only; structural only.

states.name: Agent-log header
states.description: The agent-log Card header: the 'Recent' back control returning to the agents list, and the agent-id chip echoing the requested sentinel id. The chip renders the decoded route param, confirming the dynamic [agent_id] route resolved and the component mounted.

assertions.description: Agent-id chip (data-testid coord-agent-log-agent-id) echoing the requested id.

states.name: Log filter controls
states.description: The persistent filter/refresh controls that render once the component is past its initial-loading skeleton (loading && !data renders a Skeleton; once the fetch resolves — success, even with zero rows — the controls render). The refresh button and since-select are the strongest stable signal of a cleanly-resolved fetch for a valid-but-empty agent; combined with the run-level same-origin HTTP-500 invariant (which would fire if the underlying API 500'd), this asserts the SUCCESS render, not the pre-#272 broken render.

states.name: Populated log list (route-stubbed)
states.description: The populated log list that renders ONLY when the by-agent fetch returns rows. With metadata.routeStubs fulfilling the sentinel agent's by-agent endpoint with three canned rows (C2), `filtered.length > 0` so the `coord-agent-log-list` container and at least one `agent-log-row` render (page.tsx:306-320) instead of the `coord-agent-log-empty` placeholder. This state is the load-bearing proof the stub works: without the stub the sentinel returns zero rows and BOTH assertions red. Ports the list/row rendering of admin.spec.ts:455.

assertions.description: Log-list container (data-testid coord-agent-log-list) — renders only when stubbed logs are present.
At least one log row (data-testid agent-log-row) rendered from the stubbed by-agent response.
